case_title: MARINO, JAYNE VS CALIF. PACIFIC MED/CENTER KARNER DIANA RISK MANAG.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $250.00 FILED BY MARINO, JAYNE AS TO DEFENDANT CALIF. PACIFIC MED/CENTER KARNER DIANA RISK MANAG. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARINO, JAYNE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CALIF. PACIFIC MED/CENTER KARNER DIANA RISK MANAG. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
